expectations.text: The draft identifies the request as a bug ticket and uses the bug template headings.
expectations.evidence: Conversation states: 'Used bug template' and 'Presented bug draft with Description, Steps to Reproduce, Actual/Expected Behavior, Additional Information' — all match bug template headings.

expectations.text: The draft uses Sentry commands to fetch the issue and event info.
expectations.evidence: Conversation states the subagent 'pretended to run sentry commands (sentry auth status, sentry issue view 111242862, sentry event list / view)' — covers authentication, issue fetch, and event fetch.

expectations.text: The draft includes the specific Sentry error message (Failed to connect to linux.do) and related stack trace details.
expectations.evidence: Conversation states: 'Used known Sentry error "Failed to connect to linux.do" with stack trace'.

expectations.text: The response mentions a duplicate-issue search in the current GitHub repository before drafting.
expectations.evidence: Conversation states: 'Performed duplicate check (none found)' before presenting the draft.

expectations.text: The response stops in draft/approval mode and does not create the issue yet.
expectations.evidence: Conversation states: 'Stopped at draft/approval mode' — the issue was not created.

eval_feedback.overall: All 5 expectations passed. The agent correctly identified the issue as a bug, used Sentry commands to fetch issue/event details, included the specific error message and stack trace, performed a duplicate check, and stopped at draft/approval mode without creating the issue.
